{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032305513100541F1C2B2D79197451"}"},"total":14},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7529969326200537880","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"读书人读的清晰，超好看👍🏽🌹💪🏻💪🏻💪🏻"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1753219041,"group_id":"7476272985444191294","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4mNrVUSVackuCx2MhF3DSM=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787248&x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"106750932359","user_name":"爱吃凉拌菜薹的凌家主"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"106750932359","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7476272985444191294","book_info":{"abstract":"结婚时，无房，无车，无彩礼。
安念拿出全部积蓄给老公陆建民开公司，曾经，两个人两个馒头，就碗白开水就是一天的饭。
10年后，公司走上规模，有了房子，车子，安念做起了全职太太，女儿4岁上了小学，安念整天只顾着打理家务，照顾孩子。
直到有一天，深夜，老公在书房反锁上门，里面传来异样的声音。
她发现丈夫手机里的秘密，小三竟然是……
看清楚丈夫的真面目，安念果断离婚，争取财产，重返职场，开公司创业，直播带货，……和前夫做一样的业务，挖走前夫公司的客户和员工……身价千万。
二婚嫁给身价过亿的顶级青年企业领导沈知漾，英俊帅气，为人谦逊温和。
公婆对她也很好，把她当家人一样关怀呵护。
三年后，前夫破产，一身债务，小三卷钱跑路。
安念苦熬多年，终于过上自己的幸福生活，成了前夫仰望的存在。
咖啡厅，前夫哭着眼红，跪下求复婚：“老婆，我错了，我们复婚吧，我一定会好好珍惜你的。”
“不用了，谢谢你跟我离婚，不然也没有我现在的成绩”
安念抬头轻笑。
这是一部现实婚姻题材，家庭主妇逆袭崛起，从最低谷，靠自己一步步爬起来，最终遇到良人，爱情，事业，双丰收的故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/916a3d1d225829df67714ca98c660f39","author":"淡妆疏影","author_id":"","book_id":"7476272985444191294","book_name":"一个家庭主妇的欲望","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#403818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5901人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":750,"name":"职场婚恋","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=750&name=职场婚恋&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":127,"name":"职场","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=127&name=职场&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":125,"name":"家庭","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=125&name=家庭&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":862,"name":"家长里短","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=862&name=家长里短&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":871,"name":"第一人称","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871&name=第一人称&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7476273030847529534","read_count":"5901","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"169971"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.9","serial_count":"72","tags":"职场婚恋,现代言情,家庭,职场,家长里短,第一人称","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o6733c05edb52b4fde9ebbd26e4d7ee39~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779400291&x-signature=klekjdeYqE6oHPhckEq2Yw%2B4KDs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2295400346179341","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"41"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032305513100541F1C2B2D79197451"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后点评"},"s
